BABY FROG
CAR
(Crayon scribbles)
Once upon a time there was a baby frog in the road and a truck squished it. A car squished it too.
It grew back up and went home in the stump with the hole. It played and read and cooked. It has a mommy frog and a daddy frog and a lot of baby frogs. It cooked soup and a car went very fast and it got sad. It was too loud. It feels better because it's hugging its mommy. The End.

items.title: Khris Middleton signed a 3-year, $17.61 million deal. It’s fully guaranteed for the ‘26-27 season ($5.59 million), partially guaranteed for the ‘27-28 season ($909K guaranteed of $5.87 million), and non-guaranteed for the ‘28-29 season, as part of a sign-and-trade to the Wizards.
